roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED

/CAL  SENTENCING BEFORE JUDGE SAMUEL K, FENG IN DEPT, 13/TN  ROBERT CHRISOPHER PORTER/AKA: DENNIS SMITH/X: THE DEFENDANT, HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN CASE #17018738, AGREESTO THE FOLLOWING ORDER:/ /CTORD:  THAT THE STAY AWAY ORDER(S) AND ANY RESTITUTION OWED FROM CASE #17018738 MAY BE ADDEDAS TERMS AND CONDITIONS TO THE SENTENCING IN CASE # 18002528  PURSUANT TOTHE HARVEY WAIVER TAKEN IN CASE #17018738/AJW/CH1: ISS: PROB 3Y: PJ 1Y/CTS: 56/4019HALF/CTORD:  THAT DEFENDANT MAY SERVE THE 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IN A SUBSTANCE ABUSE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM, THE DEFENDANT MUSTHAVE ELECTRONIC MONITORING WHILE IN THE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/CTORD: ANY CREDITS THAT THE DEFENDANT HAS ACCUMULATED UP TO AND INCLUDING THETIME DEFENDANT ENTERS THE PROGRAM, WILL NOT GO TOWARDS THE TIME TO BE SPENTIN THE PROGRAM,  THE DEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE THE ENTIRE PROGRAM NO MATTERHOW LONG IT IS/DEF:  WILL RECEIVE DAY FOR DAY CREDIT FOR TIME SPENT IN THEPROGRAM TOWARDS THE 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE/X:  IF THE DEFENDANT DOESNOT COMPLETE THE PROGRAM OR IS TERMINATED FROM THE PROGRAM, THEN HE WILL NOT RECEIVE CREDIT FOR ANY OF THE TIME SPENT IN THE PROGRAM TOWARDS THE 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE / /CTORD:  RESTITUTION IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT/SA2: 896 VALENCIA STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO, 150 YARDS/SA2: 7 CLARENCE PLACE IN SAN FRANCISCO, 150 YARDS/SA2: 1400 GEARY BOULEVARD IN SAN FRANCISCO, 150 YARDS/SAORD/WS/WEAP/DNACOMP/IND/VF4:300/ PROBREVFN/PC/PSR/BKFEE/COA: 40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL: SENTENCING BEFORE JUDGE SAMUEL K, FENG IN DEPT, 13/NP/X: A CR-210 FORM IS SUBMITTED BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/X: THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH PC 29810,   THE CR-210 IS SIGNED ANDFILED IN OPEN COURT,/X: PER DEPUTY B, GALLIANI, THE DEFENDANT HAS BEEN HOUSED IN A SAFETY CELL AND WAS NOT TRANSPORTED TODAY,/TWS/CONT/DOPC/

/CAL: DISPOSITION/TN: ROBERT PORTER/X: INFORMATION FILED IN OPEN COURT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERSWVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/ARBUCKLE/SA2: 896 VALENCIA ST, 7 CLARENCE PLACE, AND 1400 GEARY BLVD ALL IN SAN FRANCISCO,/SAORD//X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN 18002093 AND 17018738 ISORDERED AS FOLLOWS:/X:COMPLY WITH PROTECTIVE ORDERS AND ANY RESTITUTION PREVIOUSLY ORDERED,/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS ALL ALLEGATIONS IS GRANTED,/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:04-02-18/PPRFCUST/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:SGT, ALEX RODATOS, SFPD/HTA1:1/X:THECOURT FINDS THE ALLEGATION LISTED IN THE COMPLAINT TO BE TRUE/BAIL:100,000/DEFTCUST3/4011,5/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/LD: 03-05-18/CONT/DOP/X:  THIS CASE WAS TO BESENT OUT TO AN AVAILABLE DEPARTMENT TO CONDUCT THIS PRELIMINARY HEARING,/X:  NEITHER COUNSEL WANTED TO PROCEED IN ANOTHER DEPARTMENT AND REQUESTED THAT THIS MATTER BE CONTINUED TO THE LAST DAY,/
/CAL:SENTENCING/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:CASE HEARD IN DEPT 13 /
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 03-05-18/987,2/X: BAIL REMAINS 100,000/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
